data.content: Implementation review rejected on spec compliance. The current commit removes non-lease agent flags from claim and poll and restores shipped step metadata, but it still sends note/handoff identity flags through updateKnot(). That is a contract failure under the clarified requirement that all identity flags are lease-owned and may only be provided at lease creation. Return to implementation and remove note/handoff identity flag forwarding, then revalidate the regression tests and quality gates.
